prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: KOL-CIRCUITTESTER-11034
Product Type: ELECTRIC_CIRCUIT_TESTING_DEVICE
Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux
Existing Title: ToolTreaux 6 and 12 Volt Circuit Tester with Fuse Clip Automotive Voltage Tester
Description: Whether you’re a seasoned automotive repairman or looking to repair your vehicle at home, you need a safe and reliable circuit tester. The ToolTreaux circuit tester will allow you to test the DC voltage in your automotive applications from 6 to 12 volts. Our circuit tester is safe and easy to use to test fuses in the junction block, automotive circuits for voltage, and probe connectors and sockets. It comes with a convenient fuse clip and features a sharp tip for piercing wire installation if needed. This circuit tester features a series of lights that will show the state of the wiring and voltage, and is a must-have tool for any vehicle owner or auto-repair technician.
Search Terms: circuit testers circuit tester electrical tools electrical testing volt tester 6 volt tester 12 volt tester electronics multi tool wire tester wire testing circuit testing automotive tester voltage tester auto tools auto electronics tools
Features:
- 6V AND 12V CIRCUIT TESTER - ToolTreaux circuit tester is used to test DC voltage in automotive applications; Test your DC voltage from 6-12 Volts
- EASY TO USE - Safe circuit tester tests fuses in the junction block, automotive circuits for voltage and probe connectors and sockets; Easy and safe voltage testing tool for home auto-testing
- FUSE CLIP - Comes with a convenient fuse clip and sharp tip for piercing wire installation if needed; Features a series of lights that show the state of the wiring and voltage
- VERSATILE TOOL - Automotive voltage testers are a must-have tool for any vehicle owner or auto-repair enthusiast; Make sure your DC voltage is at the correct level with this simple tool
- SPECIFICATIONS - Volt sizes: 6 and 12; Fuse clip included; yes; Power source: wired; Materials: plastic, metal; Colors: black, yellow

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 6 and 12 Volt Circuit Tester with Fuse Clip

anthropic.title_differentiation: DC Voltage Testing, Fuse Clip And Sharp Tip, LED Lights, Automotive Applications, Easy To Use, Vehicle Repair

openai.title_differentiation: Fuse Clip Included, Piercing Tip, Tests 6V And 12V DC Circuits, Light Indicator, Probe Connectors, Junction Blocks
